title: Add wishlist controls and page
verify: Catalog and product-detail render accessible product-level favorite controls using opaque product ID.
Guest control routes to login with safe current return path and creates no pending favorite intent.
Valid-current-customer control remains usable during merge_blocked, renders idle/pending/saved/error, and prevents duplicate mutation while pending.
Wishlist page renders only the exact minimal projection and handles loading/empty/products/error/remove/session-expired with current handles.
evidence_required: Wishlist component/page state tests including merge_blocked access.
Guest login routing and no-intent assertions.
Exact projection rendering, accessibility labels/disabled pending, and current-handle assertions.
Storefront build/typecheck and Memory Bank lint output.
constraints: Reuse existing catalog/product visual language and FT-004 login return-path behavior.
Authorize wishlist UI by successful current-customer retrieval, not cart-merge/checkout readiness.
Render only exact WishlistProductProjection product-level fields; do not store variant selection.
No guest persistence or automatic post-login favorite.
invariants: UI uses opaque product ID for mutation and handle only for navigation.
merge_blocked blocks checkout but not wishlist for a valid current customer.
Guest click changes no wishlist state.
Backend response remains rendered saved-state truth.
purpose: Expose the authenticated wishlist value through existing catalog/detail surfaces and one focused wishlist page.
success_outcome: Buyers can discover, add, view, and remove product favorites with truthful auth/pending/error states and no guest persistence.
anti_goals: Do not add variant favorites, sharing, notes, folders, or recommendations.

stop_conditions: Existing product surfaces do not expose opaque product ID from TASK-036.
Guest login routing would require persisted favorite intent.
UI requires fields outside exact WishlistProductProjection.
Wishlist UI would be disabled solely because cart merge is blocked.
